name.pt-BR: EMS-Door Sensor de Porta LoRaWAN Elsys

description.en-US: Elsys EMS-Door — LoRaWAN (Class A) indoor sensor that monitors open/close (door) status, temperature and humidity. Uplinks are Elsys TLV frames on FPort 5.
description.pt-BR: Elsys EMS-Door — sensor LoRaWAN (Classe A) de ambiente interno que monitora status de abertura/fechamento (porta), temperatura e umidade. Os uplinks são quadros TLV Elsys no FPort 5.
